donate: If you like this tool, donate here
p1: ePubFlow transforms your EPUB books by bolding the first few letters of each word.
p2: This technique guides your eyes by creating artificial fixation points. It helps your brain complete words faster, naturally improving your reading flow and speed.
contactP1: This tool is totally free and aims to encourage people to read more. It is the work of a single person and is still under development to offer more compatible formats.
contactP2Pre: If you have any suggestions you can send me an email to:
contactP2Post: . Feel free to share the tool with anyone you think will find it useful!
contactP3: If you found the tool useful and would like to support the project with a small donation, you can use the floating Buy Me a Coffee or Ko-fi buttons located on the bottom right of your screen.
dragHere: Drag and drop your EPUB file here
orClick: or click to select a file
errorProcessing: Error processing the EPUB file. Please ensure it's a valid format.
invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload an EPUB.
